last_session.notes: Project bootstrap session. All planning and documentation files written. No implementation code yet. S1 code is the next action.

current_sprint.name: Foundation
current_sprint.goal: Implement log buffer (three-term mmap) and IPC ring buffers with ≥ 90% test coverage

open_questions.question: Should Hyperspace support QUIC 0-RTT for reconnection? 0-RTT has replay attack implications at the messaging layer.
What is the maximum supported message size? Fragmentation at the log buffer layer needs a defined limit.

next_action: Backend Engineer: implement pkg/logbuffer and pkg/ipc per sprint contract S1.md. Start with pkg/ipc/memmap (mmap utilities) as pkg/logbuffer depends on it.
notes: First implementation session. Documentation bootstrap complete: SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE.md, SPEC.md, CLAUDE.md, progress.json, decision_log.md, sprint_contracts/S1.md, sprint_contracts/S2.md, session_state.json, session_handoff.md all written.
